use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};

#[derive(Serialize, Deserialize)]
#[serde(tag = "type", rename_all = "snake_case")]
enum ApiResponse {
    Success { data: serde_json::Value },
    Error { code: u32, message: String },
    Redirect { url: String, status: u32 },
}

#[derive(Serialize, Deserialize)]
#[serde(tag = "kind", rename_all = "lowercase")]
enum ConfigValue {
    Text(String),
    Number(f64),
    Flag(bool),
}

fn parse_response(json: &str) -> Result<ApiResponse, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let resp: ApiResponse = serde_json::from_str(json)?;
    Ok(resp)
}

fn parse_config_value(json: &str) -> Result<ConfigValue, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let val: ConfigValue = serde_json::from_str(json)?;
    Ok(val)
}
